---
title: "ERDDAP Cloud Migration Presentations"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

This page contains the ERDDAP Cloud Migration presentation used for project updates and stakeholder briefings.

The presentation is updated continuously as we present to more groups over time.

<div class="slideshow">
  <button class="slide-btn prev" onclick="changeSlide(-1)">&#10094;</button>

  <img id="current-slide" class="slide-show-img" src="assets/presentations/erddap-cloud-migration/Slide1.png" alt="ERDDAP Cloud Migration slide">

  <button class="slide-btn next" onclick="changeSlide(1)">&#10095;</button>
</div>

<div class="slide-counter">
  Slide <span id="slide-num">1</span> of 21
</div>

<script>
let currentSlide = 1;
const totalSlides = 21;

function showSlide(n) {
  if (n > totalSlides) currentSlide = 1;
  if (n < 1) currentSlide = totalSlides;

  document.getElementById("current-slide").src =
    `assets/presentations/erddap-cloud-migration/Slide${currentSlide}.png`;

  document.getElementById("slide-num").textContent = currentSlide;
}

function changeSlide(step) {
  currentSlide += step;
  showSlide(currentSlide);
}

document.addEventListener("keydown", function(event) {
  if (event.key === "ArrowRight") changeSlide(1);
  if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") changeSlide(-1);
});
</script>
